title: Plastic BossBar
description: Bring your bosses' health bars to life! This resource pack gives them a stylish plastic texture inspired by Bare Bones, making them crisp, colorful, and modern.
body:
### **Bring your bosses'** health bars to life!
This resource pack gives them a stylish plastic texture inspired by Bare Bones, making them crisp, colorful, and modern. Fully compatible with any mods or texture packs.

**Plastic BossBar** is a minimalist and elegant resource pack that changes the appearance of boss health bars in Minecraft. Inspired by the aesthetic of the iconic Bare Bones pack, it replaces the standard gradient bars with clean 'plastic' elements featuring crisp outlines and saturated colors.

The bars become more than just indicators—they transform into a stylish part of the interface that blends seamlessly with any other texture pack.
